footer.tagline: Airbnb Interior Design & Renovation in Marrakech
footer.address: Guéliz, Rue de la Liberté, Immeuble Dani, Bureau 16, Marrakech

airbnb.badge: Take advantage of the Homestage offer
airbnb.label: For new property owners
airbnb.title: Your property is empty. Travellers make their choice in 3 seconds.
airbnb.subtitle: On Airbnb or Booking, the decision is visual, instant and emotional. A standard apartment no longer cuts it in a competitive market like Marrakech. We don't decorate — we create immersive experiences that trigger the booking.
airbnb.approach_title: Design + Construction. Where others stop, we keep going.
airbnb.approach_body: An 'Instagrammable' design means nothing if the floors wear out in 3 months. Combining interior design with BTP (construction) expertise, we handle structural issues — damp, electrics, plumbing — that decorators ignore. The result: a property that looks stunning and stays that way after hundreds of stays.
airbnb.adv1: Premium design that triggers instant desire — +20% to +40% on nightly rate
airbnb.adv2: Construction-grade materials built for high-turnover use (flooring, fabrics, reinforced joinery)
airbnb.adv3: Full remote site monitoring — photo and video updates at every stage, approve from abroad
airbnb.adv4: Airbnb listing + pro photos included — your listing rises in the algorithm from day one
airbnb.process_title: From bare apartment to first booking
airbnb.s1_desc: Property visit, local competitor analysis, potential assessment. We offer visits to our live worksites.
airbnb.s2_desc: A unique visual concept — Bohemian, Arty, or Modern-Moroccan. 3D projection and style validation with you.
airbnb.s3_desc: Our teams handle paint, electrics, lighting and floors. Real-time photo/video updates from abroad.
airbnb.s4_desc: Furniture, lighting and décor installation. What costs little but produces a massive 'Wow' effect.
airbnb.s5_desc: Professional photo session + optimised Airbnb listing creation. Your property is ready to earn.
airbnb.trust_note: 30+ active listings — guest reviews available on request
airbnb.trust_listing: Our Airbnb listings open for review
airbnb.cta_title: Turn your property into a rental success.
airbnb.testimonial_quote: "I handed over the keys to a bare apartment. 4 weeks later it was live and generating revenue."
airbnb.cta_sub: Free first consultation · No commitment · Live worksites available to visit
